title: solenostemon collinus
intro: Solenostemon collinus, also known as Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Solenostemon collinus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
